news.title: Source: Elastic agrees to buy CRV-backed DeductiveAI for up to $85M
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] DeductiveAI, a startup that uses AI to catch and resolve bugs in software, was founded just three years ago.

news.title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.

news.title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be composed of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.

news.title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.

news.title: Almost half of US singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and conversation starters.

news.title: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.

news.title: OpenAI hires former Trump AI official Dean Ball
news.description: [POLITICO] The artificial intelligence giant has hired the former top White House AI adviser and lead author of the White House’s AI Action Plan.

news.title: Federal regulators back Trump's plan to speed power to energy-hungry AI data centers
news.description: [WDIV CLICKONDETROIT] Federal regulators have agreed to let large energy users connect more quickly to the nation’s inefficient and electric transmission system to accommodate surging demand from power-hungry artificial intelligence data centers.

news.title: Regulators back Trump plan to speed power to energy-hungry AI data centers
news.description: [THE ASSOCIATED PRESS] Federal regulators have agreed to let large energy users connect more quickly to the nation’s inefficient and electric transmission system to accommodate surging demand from power-hungry artificial intelligence data centers.

news.title: Federal Regulators Back Trump's Plan to Speed Power to Energy-Hungry AI Data Centers
news.description: [U.S. NEWS & WORLD REPORT] WASHINGTON (AP) — Federal regulators on Thursday agreed to let large energy users connect more quickly to the nation’s inefficient and electric transmission system to accommodate surging demand from power-hungry artificial intelligence data centers.

news.title: Original investors may buy back Chinese-origin AI startup Manus that Meta purchased for $2 billion
news.description: [TIMES OF INDIA] Tech News News: The original Chinese backers of artificial intelligence (AI) startup Manus are planning to buy the company back from Facebook’s parent company, Meta, .
